## Contribution checklist

- [ ] I started from `cases/template-case.json`.
- [ ] The case contains no real personal, medical, or financial data.
- [ ] `python -m claimpilot_harness validate cases` passes.
- [ ] The cautious baseline receives a passing score or the PR explains why the baseline should improve.
